creator: grog@FreeBSD.org
text: Problem confirmed. This is a bug in the graphics/vigra package, which for some reason doesn't currently include PNG support. See bug 228623. Until the problem has been fixed and a new package has been created, you can work around the problem by removing the vigra package and building from the port (/usr/ports/graphics/vigra).  No options are needed, though it would be a good idea to run 'make config' to confirm that PNG support is included in the build.
